title: What is werewolf Asuka
wikitext:
[]: What is werewolf Asuka?             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Tue Jun 04, 2013 3:27 am I've seen people mention it in a few places and was wondering what it was.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jun 04, 2013 3:34 am http://wiki.evageeks.org/Geektionary#Werewolf_Asuka When Anno invited staff to submit their ideas for the NGE movie, way back in the day, Ikuto Yamashita came up with a batshit insane scenario (part of which is published in Sore o nasumono) involving an Eva-like thing called FORTUNE, a device called Spine of the Death God, and people degenerating into ... "werewolves". No, seriously. To make matters even more ... interesting, the montage illustration Yamashita prepared for his scenario shows Asuka as a "werewolf"! (Though, to be honest, she looks more like a Thundercat...)

[]:             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Tue Jun 04, 2013 3:46 am Mr. Tines wrote: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Geektionary#Werewolf_Asuka

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Tue Jun 04, 2013 4:40 am I would love to see that illustration.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Tue Jun 04, 2013 4:46 am http://wiki.evageeks.org/Sore_o_Nasumono Might be able to find images of it if you search scans of the above linked publication.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jun 04, 2013 4:52 am Xbox heug  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Tue Jun 04, 2013 5:02 am Mmm yeah, that looks more tame than I imagined. Also Rei with the shitty trigger discipline.

[]:             Quote Post by tzigi » Tue Jun 04, 2013 5:25 am Mr. Tines wrote: Xbox heug  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Jul 27, 2013 5:52 pm Bump because it's the only relevant thread I can find. Anyone know the original publication history behind Sore o Nasumono? The book everyone seems to have is the one published by Kadokawa. While out on the internet I came across this: That's Yamashita's artwork on the cover and it's titles Sore o Nasumono. But at the same time it seems like a doujin, credits to circle "BULE AND PURPRE" (I'm assuming it's supposed to be BLUE AND PURPLE) and [s]supposedly has an 18+ rating.[/s] (I think I was mistaken about this 非18禁 = non-18-restricted?) On top of that the artwork used for the cover is credited to something Super Robot Wars related done for Media Works by the Die Sterne index. Anyone know what the hell this is? EDIT: After a bit of googling around it seems like this was the original doujin release of Yamashita's material in 1995 and at 86 pages total. Kodakawa apparently liked it and padded it to 143 pages for official release in 1998. Someone please correct me if I'm wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Sun Jul 28, 2013 6:26 am tzigi wrote: Rei looks here like Yuzuriha Nekoi on a bad hair day. Just compare those CLAMP eyes. I've never expected to see them in any official NGE art... SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Deva Victrix » Mon Aug 19, 2013 2:38 am Mr. Tines wrote: Xbox heug  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Aug 19, 2013 11:19 am And she has her middle finger on the trigger. That image actually reminds me of this Appleseed illustration: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Deva Victrix » Tue Aug 20, 2013 9:53 pm Guess who has a new avatar?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Aug 21, 2013 1:07 pm So, they made Unit 02 turn into the werewolf at the end of Ha instead of Asuka. I see.

[]:             Quote Post by Deva Victrix » Wed Aug 21, 2013 7:17 pm Must....not...write....Werewolf Asuka...fanfiction....grrrrnrnnnghghghgh.... Asuka: Hay Shinji.....*wiggles eyebrows* Wanna yiff? Shinji: BWAAAAAH!
